summary: The run likely failed because the model exceeded available memory.

symptoms.name: memory pressure
symptoms.evidence: Detected an out-of-memory error in the log.

suggested_fixes: Reduce batch size or sequence length.
Enable mixed precision or gradient checkpointing.
Free cached tensors and avoid storing full activations unnecessarily.
next_steps: Reduce batch size or context length.
Enable mixed precision to cut activation memory.
Profile peak memory around the forward pass.
